name: Nitro Magna Charge
description: Nitro Magna Charge is a special Nitro-themed variant of the Tech element Skylander Magna Charge. He features a distinctive gold and checkered racing aesthetic, representing the high-speed 'Nitro' theme.
biography: Magna Charge came from the great race of Ultron robots, but was mysteriously created with a giant magnet head. This proved problematic, as his peers were all made of metal and were constantly being pulled towards him. As a result, Magna Charge was exiled to a faraway island, where he eventually learned to control his magnetic powers. After years of training, he returned to his home to demonstrate his abilities, but found everything completely destroyed. In searching for answers, Magna Charge caught the attention of Master Eon, who realized the unique Ultron soldier was a perfect candidate for the Skylanders.
personality: Magna Charge is incredibly focused, calculating, and efficient, as expected of a high-tech Ultron robot. Despite his mechanical nature, he shows great loyalty to the Skylanders and possesses a heroic drive to protect the innocent from Arkeyan-level threats. He considers himself superior in all areas, which is rarely a surprise given his advanced construction.

story.content: Magna Charge came from the great race of Ultron robots, but was mysteriously created with a giant magnet head. This proved problematic, as his peers were all made of metal and were constantly being pulled towards him. As a result, Magna Charge was exiled to a faraway island, where he eventually learned to control his magnetic powers. After years of training, he returned to his home to demonstrate his abilities, but found everything completely destroyed. In searching for answers, Magna Charge caught the attention of Master Eon, who realized the unique Ultron soldier was a perfect candidate for the Skylanders.

content: I guess you could say I'm in.... Charge.
The magnetic force density is an affector field.
This place fills me with excitement.
I am superior in all areas. Not surprisingly.
I now have an attractive quality.
There is no denying my magnetism.

trivia: He is the only SWAP Force Skylander to have a hand on only one arm.
The original concept designs for Magna Charge included a massive gatling gun on his left arm, which was eventually included as his Soul Gem upgrade.
He is one of the few Skylanders with only one eye, alongside Shroomboom, Rocky Roll, and Eye-Brawl.
During early development, his eye and wheel were both yellow instead of green.
When his bottom half is fully upgraded, his wheel turns blue.
He can perform a secret backflip that damages enemies by pressing the primary attack while charging.
Magna Charge resembles Rocket from Robot on Wheels.
He is one of the few Swap Force Skylanders without true legs, alongside Doom Stone, Rattle Shake, and Night Shift.
His voice actor, Gregg Berger, also voiced Hunter and Ripto in the original Spyro the Dragon games.
The name of his species is a reference to the Marvel Comics character, Ultron.
The magnet theme is a reference to how the real-world SWAP Force figures use magnets to swap parts.

trailers.name: Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Magna Charge (Attract to Attack)
Skylanders Swap Force - Magna Charge Soul Gem Preview (Attract to Attack)

gameplay: Nitro Magna Charge is a speed-based character who uses magnetism to manipulate enemies. He can pick up enemies and throw them, or use his bottom half to dash through groups of foes at incredible speeds. His top half focuses on projectile magnetic blasts. He is capable of gathering gold and food around him while using Polarized Pickup and can stop enemies from spinning by using his magnetic abilities.

basic.name: Magnet Cannon
basic.content: Hold Attack 1 to rapidly fire energy projectiles. Firing for too long will cause the cannon to overheat.

basic.name: Magneto Ball
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to drag an enemy around. Press Attack 2 again to launch them forward. Large enemies cannot be dragged.

basic_upgrades.name: Polarized Pickup
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to pick up enemies. Press Attack 3 again to slam them. While active, loot will be drawn in from a distance!

basic_upgrades.name: Eject
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 1 while dragging an object or enemy to throw it behind to boost forward.

basic_upgrades.name: Plasma Shots
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 to rapidly shoot a Magnet Cannon that does increased damage. Projectiles heat up after a short time, dealing extra fire damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Rad Wheels
basic_upgrades.content: Speed is increased. Brand new developments in magnet wheels!

basic_upgrades.name: Magnetic Buildup
basic_upgrades.content: Hold an object with Polarized Pickup for a short time, release it to deal extra damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Drag Capacity
basic_upgrades.content: Two enemies can be dragged at once while dashing.

soulgems.name: Multi Barrelled
soulgems.content: Upgraded Magnet Cannon that shoots 3 projectiles at once!

soulgems.name: Super Repulsor
soulgems.content: A new wheel makes thrown objects gain increased damage, range and speed.

abilities.name: Discharge Recharge
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to overheat the Magnet Cannon, release to shoot a large fireball.

abilities.name: Heavy Blaster
abilities.content: Magnet cannon does even more damage.

abilities.name: Burst Pickup
abilities.content: Picking up enemies with Polarized Pickup will knock back nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Magnetic Personality
abilities.content: Magnet attacks do increased damage. Two-Ton's Law states: if it has mass, it can be slammed.

abilities.name: Shock Stop
abilities.content: Press (X) while dragging an enemy to drop it in front of you and shock it.

abilities.name: Crash Test
abilities.content: Shock Stop and Eject do increased damage.

abilities.name: Rapid Repel
abilities.content: Press (X) while dragging an object or enemy to shoot it without stopping.

abilities.name: Opposites Repel
abilities.content: Rapid Repel does increased damage. Repulsive!
